export type CamelCase<S extends string> = S extends `${infer P1}-${infer P2}${infer P3}`
  ? `${Lowercase<P1>}${Uppercase<P2>}${CamelCase<P3>}`
  : Lowercase<S>

export const startCase = (str: string): string =>
  str
    .replace(RX_UNDERSCORE, ' ')
    .replace(RX_LOWER_UPPER, (_, $1, $2) => `${$1} ${$2}`)
    .replace(RX_FIRST_START_SPACE_WORD, (_, $1, $2) => $1 + $2.toUpperCase())

export const titleCase = (str: string): string =>
  str
    .replace(RX_UNDERSCORE, ' ')
    .replace(RX_LOWER_UPPER, (_, $1, $2) => `${$1} ${$2}`)
    .replace(RX_START_SPACE_WORD, (_, $1, $2) => $1 + $2.toUpperCase())

const hasName =
    arg0 &&
    (arg0.type === 'StringLiteral' ||
      (arg0.type === 'TemplateLiteral' && arg0.expressions.length === 0))

const isNativeOn = (key: string) =>
  key.charCodeAt(0) === 111 /* o */ &&
  key.charCodeAt(1) === 110 /* n */ &&
  // lowercase letter
  key.charCodeAt(2) > 96 &&
  key.charCodeAt(2) < 123

export const isOn = (key: string): boolean =>
  key.charCodeAt(0) === 111 /* o */ &&
  key.charCodeAt(1) === 110 /* n */ &&
  // uppercase letter
  (key.charCodeAt(2) > 122 || key.charCodeAt(2) < 97)
